news_items.headline: Braves' Martín Pérez on injury list, DFA Carrasco
news_items.summary: The Braves placed left-hander Martín Pérez on the 15-day injured list on Monday with a left forearm contusion.

news_items.headline: Sources: Draft prospect Bumila has UCL injury
news_items.summary: Fireballing Massachusetts prep left-hander Brody Bumila shared an MRI with MLB teams on Monday that revealed damage to the ulnar collateral ligament in his left elbow, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Dodgers C to debut despite tragedy in Venezuela
news_items.summary: The stepmom and sister of Dodgers catcher Eliezer Alfonzo Jr. were found dead as a result of the earthquakes in Venezuela last week.

news_items.headline: Suarez exits Red Sox win with adductor tightness
news_items.summary: Boston pitcher Ranger Suarez, a left-hander named to the American League All-Star team, left his start with two outs in the third inning Sunday due to left adductor tightness, but the Red Sox bullpen helped anchor a 7-5 win over the Los Angeles Angels.

news_items.headline: Marlins pull Pérez after 7 perfect innings vs. A's...
news_items.summary: Eury Pérez was pulled after pitching seven perfect innings Sunday, and the Marlins nearly blew an eight-run lead before holding on vs. the A's.

news_items.headline: Twins star Buxton leaves game with hip injury
news_items.summary: Twins All-Star center fielder Byron Buxton left Sunday's game against the Yankees following the first inning after aggravating a hip injury.

news_items.headline: Stanton still not running since injury setback; return remains up in air
Mets Notes: Andy Green reveals updated injury rehab plan for Jorge Polanco
news_items.summary: Mets interim manager Andy Green shared an update on Jorge Polanco, revealing a plan to have the slugger play in back-to-back games as part of his injury rehab from left Achilles bursitis.

news_items.headline: Braves vs Mets Game Thread: 7/6/2026
news_items.summary: The Braves have a chance for a 4-game series win behind Reynaldo Lopez against the Mets today. Join us and discuss tonight’s game in the comments below! Game Info Game Date/Time: Monday, July 6, 7:15 p.m. ET Location: Truist Park, Atlanta, GA TV: BravesVision Streaming: MLB.tv Radio: 680 AM / 93.7 FM The Fan

news_items.headline: Astros vs. Nationals Game Discussion: 7/6/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Astros will conclude the first half of their season with a six-game road trip beginning tonight in the nation’s capital with the first of three games against the Nationals. RHP Mike Burrows (4-8) will open the road trip for Houston opposite RHP Miles Mikolas (2-7) and the Nats. SPINNING RECORDS: At 45-47, […]
